<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-265" location="lines:265-270" -->
```bash
  # Get the synchronizer ID from connected synchronizers
  SYNCHRONIZER_ID=$(curl -f -sS -L http://localhost:2975/v2/state/connected-synchronizers \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEDGER_TOKEN" | jq -r ".connectedSynchronizers[0].synchronizerId")
 
  echo "Synchronizer ID: $SYNCHRONIZER_ID"

```
